summary: A clip from a Fox News Special Report segment. Nighttime footage shows a crime scene with police vehicles and flashing lights behind caution tape; the lower-third reads IMMIGRATION FIGHT REKINDLED, ILLEGAL ALIENS ACCUSED OF VIOLENT CRIMES IN VIRGINIA. The segment cuts to a woman with blonde hair speaking at a microphone outside the U.S. Capitol; the banner reads GOVERNOR UNDER FIRE, CRITICS TARGET SPANBERGER FOR I.C.E. POLICY SHIFT.

script.scene: Nighttime crime-scene footage with police vehicles; lower-third reads IMMIGRATION FIGHT REKINDLED.
A woman speaks at a microphone outside the Capitol; banner reads GOVERNOR UNDER FIRE, CRITICS TARGET SPANBERGER FOR I.C.E. POLICY SHIFT.
Continued footage with the Fox News Special Report framing.

notable_text: IMMIGRATION FIGHT REKINDLED; ILLEGAL ALIENS ACCUSED OF VIOLENT CRIMES IN VIRGINIA; GOVERNOR UNDER FIRE; CRITICS TARGET SPANBERGER FOR I.C.E. POLICY SHIFT; SPECIAL REPORT
